description: Triggered when the user wants to review, edit, improve, or polish existing marketing copy using a systematic approach.
should_trigger: Edit this homepage copy and make it more persuasive
Review my landing page copy and give me feedback
Polish this CTA section — it feels flat
Do a copy sweep on our pricing page
This product description is too corporate — can you fix it?
Check my copy for weak words and passive voice
Proofread and improve this feature page copy
should_not_trigger: Write copy for our new product launch landing page from scratch
Create headlines for our Google Ads campaign
Design a conversion-optimized pricing page layout
Write a cold email to prospects in the fintech space
